title: Fix account selection, add transaction button, and transfer dropdowns

requirements.text: Fix the account selector dropdown in the Add Transaction modal (AddTransactionModal.tsx) so that users can successfully select an account from the list. The select element must be interactive, properly bound to React state, and reflect the chosen value.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the account dropdown in the Add Transaction modal opens the options list
Selecting an account updates the displayed value in the dropdown
The selected account value is used when submitting the transaction form

requirements.text: Fix the Add/Submit button in the Add Transaction modal (AddTransactionModal.tsx) so that clicking it correctly submits the transaction form. The button must not be inadvertently disabled, must trigger form validation, and must invoke the mutation to save the transaction.

quotes: Add button kaam nahi kar raha

acceptanceCriteria: The Add button is enabled and clickable when required fields are filled
Clicking Add submits the form and calls the add transaction mutation
A loading state is shown while the mutation is in progress
On success, the modal closes and the transaction appears in the records list

requirements.text: Fix the From and To account selector dropdowns in the Transfer Money modal (TransferMoneyModal.tsx) so that users can select source and destination accounts. Both selectors must be interactive, independently bound to React state, and pass the correct account IDs to the transfer mutation on submit.

quotes: Transfer me From / To select nahi ho raha

acceptanceCriteria: The From account dropdown lists all user accounts and allows selection
The To account dropdown lists all user accounts and allows selection
Selecting a value in From or To updates the displayed value immediately
The correct from and to account IDs are passed to the useTransferMoney mutation on submit

requirements.text: Fix the Transfer button/action in the Accounts page (AccountsPage.tsx) so that clicking the Transfer option on an account opens the TransferMoneyModal correctly and pre-fills or allows selection of the source account. The modal must open, render without errors, and allow the user to complete a transfer.

quotes: Accounts section me transfer option bhi work nahi kar raha hai

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the Transfer button on any account in the Accounts page opens the TransferMoneyModal
The modal renders all account selector fields without errors
The user can complete the transfer form and submit it successfully
After a successful transfer, account balances update to reflect the transfer

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not change the backend data model or Motoko actor logic
Preserve all existing functionality outside of the four broken interactions
nonGoals: Adding new transaction types or account types
Changing the visual design or color theme
Modifying backend/main.mo unless a root cause is found there
Adding new pages or navigation items
